description.ko: 유기적 생명과 디지털 구조 사이의 경계를 탐구하는 매혹적인 작품으로, 광섬유 수술과 투명한 수정 잎을 가진 금속 꽃을 특징으로 합니다.
description.en: A mesmerizing exploration of the boundary between organic life and digital constructs, featuring a metallic flower with fiber-optic stamens and translucent crystalline leaves.

prompt: Macro photography of a futuristic flower, FLORA-9 model, bioluminescent blue veins pulsing through translucent glass petals, integrated circuit board patterns on the leaves, cybernetic nature, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, digital ethereal atmosphere.
